mapper.select: SELECT id, trip_id, attraction_id, city_code, source, added_at, place_name, place_category, place_address, place_lat, place_lng FROM trip_candidate WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY added_at
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM trip_block WHERE candidate_id = #{candidateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_candidate (trip_id, attraction_id, city_code, source, place_name, place_category, place_address, place_lat, place_lng) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{attractionId}, #{cityCode}, #{source}, #{placeName}, #{placeCategory}, #{placeAddress}, #{placeLat}, #{placeLng})
